scene.message: Maki: These people are{nl} victims too, aren't they.{waitkey}{ret}
Mark: Let's hurry and find{nl} Kandori.{waitkey}{ret}
Nanjo: The ordinary employees{nl} seem to know nothing.{waitkey}{ret}
Ayase: One of our students is{nl} here?{waitkey}Who could it be?{waitkey}{ret}
Brown: What's one of our{nl} students doing here?{waitkey}Not that I'm one to talk.{waitkey}{ret}
Elly: One of our students{nl} besides us?{waitkey}Who on earth could it be?{waitkey}{ret}
